text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O hasn't shown up to<n>training, and I
can't get in touch with<n>her. Worried, I set off to
look for her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, have you come to meet my<n>reflection in the
lake?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I have never forgotten the<n>visage I first saw
in my formative<n>years. And so, I come here to
revisit it<n>from time to time.
choice_data_list: And yet, you forgot your training.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Wh-what have I done? Youhave my sincerest apologies.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To think, the absence of my<n>brilliance... I have left
you cowering in<n>the frigid night of loneliness!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, stop it! Don't extend the olive<n>branch! For it is
I who left you<n>abandoned and alone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I swear to you now. I shall never<n>leave you ever
again!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I feel the urge to tease her, but I let it<n>be. At least
she understands where<n>she went wrong—in her
own way, of<n>course.
